metadata.description: Connected pipeline of review skills with a shared JSON handoff contract. Producer skills emit Findings-<skill>.json validated against schemas/findings.schema.json (markdown views rendered from it); apply-review consumes the JSON and emits Report-apply-review.json.

plugins.name: jewzaam-reviews
plugins.description: Review pipeline skills: producers emit Findings-<skill>.json; apply-review consumes them and emits Report-apply-review.json.
